self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: R1: gain 1 stack of Canopy's Favor after hitting an opponent with an Elemental Skill (once / 0.5s); a nearby party member triggering Burning or Burgeon grants 3 stacks (once / 2s, works off-field). Each stack: Elemental Skill and Burst DMG +10% for 6s, max 6 stacks (+60%).
